Skip to main content

Acme Widgets, Inc.

Quarterly Business Report

Q1 2025

Executive Summary

Acme Widgets delivered $4,821,300 in total revenue in Q1 2025, up +12.4% year-over-year, driven by strong performance across all four regions. Operating margin held at 18.7% despite continued investment in the APAC distribution network.

Financial Highlights

Total Revenue $4,821,300
Revenue Growth (YoY) +12.4%
Operating Margin 18.7%
Report Prepared April 4, 2025

Revenue by Region

Q1 2025 revenue by region (USD)
RegionRevenueShare of Total
North America$1,203,40025.0%
EMEA$982,90020.4%
APAC$1,540,70032.0%
Latin America$1,094,30022.7%
Total$4,821,300100.0%

Revenue Trend

Figure 1. Quarterly revenue trend, trailing eight quarters (source: Power BI, XMLA).

Latest plotted quarter: $4,821,300

Outlook & Risk Factors

Fiscal Year 2024 targets were exceeded, with total bookings reaching $18.2M, and management expects continued momentum through the remainder of 2025. Key risks for the coming quarter include continued freight-cost volatility in the APAC lane and a competitive pricing response from two regional entrants in EMEA. No new litigation or regulatory matters are outstanding.

100% Committed to Quality — Acme Widgets has proudly served customers since 1998.

Appendix: Methodology Notes

Figures are reported in United States Dollars (USD) unless otherwise noted. Regional revenue shares are rounded to one decimal place and may not sum exactly to 100% due to rounding. This report is prepared for internal distribution and does not constitute investment advice.
